text: Last class you said: It is a market that sells local crafts.
Today you can say: I love trying the local cuisine.
I do not like eating late at night.
I love spicy food. So do I!
Welcome to the table, Rubens. Our specialty today is a fish stew. Do you enjoy trying local dishes?
Yes, I love trying new cuisine. The flavor smells wonderful. What are the main ingredients?
Fresh fish, tomatoes, and a little seasoning. I love cooking it at home too.
So do I! But I cannot stand very spicy food. Is this dish savory or hot?
It is savory, not hot. And for dessert there is homemade cake. I do not like eating too much sugar, though.
Neither do I. This is exactly the kind of meal that I enjoy the most. Let us eat!
I love trying the local cuisine.
I enjoy cooking with fresh ingredients.
I cannot stand eating very spicy food.
I do not eat much sugar. Neither do I.
What is the specialty of this region?

Welcome to today's food walking tour. My name is Sofia, and I love showing visitors the flavors of our city. Our first stop is the central market, where you can try street food from many vendors. The local specialty is a fish stew made with fresh ingredients and simple seasoning. I really enjoy eating it on cold days, because it is hearty and warm. Next, we visit a small bakery. The owner makes homemade bread every morning, and the smell is wonderful. If you like savory food, you will love the cheese bread. And if you prefer something sweet, there is a dessert stall at the end. Brazilian cuisine is rich and varied, so come hungry. Let us begin and taste the city together.

Whenever I travel for a conference, I always make time to try the local food. I think a country's cuisine tells you a lot about its culture. I love tasting street food, because it is simple, fresh, and full of flavor. I do not enjoy eating at the hotel, because the food is always the same. On my last trip, a colleague took me to a small place that served a regional delicacy. It was a savory dish with an unusual seasoning, and I cannot stand spicy food, but this was perfect for me. These days I do not eat as much red meat as I used to, so I prefer light, healthy dishes. For me, sharing a hearty meal with new people is the best part of any trip.

Here is how I explore the food of a new city. First, I find a market where I can try street food. Then I look for the local specialty that everyone recommends. After that, I taste a homemade dish made with fresh ingredients. Next, I ask the vendor about the seasoning and the recipe. Finally, I sit down and enjoy a hearty meal with new friends.
I love trying the local cuisine.
I enjoy cooking with fresh ingredients.
I cannot stand eating very spicy food.
The local specialty is a fish stew.
The owner makes homemade bread every morning.
The local specialty is a hearty fish stew.
What is the specialty of this region?
